modules.name: Curiosity
modules.description: Test new tools quickly to see if they're valuable instead of getting wrapped up in the hype.

modules.name: Burning Questions
modules.description: Bring sharp questions to every session and ask AI what project would teach you what you want.

modules.name: Own the Build
modules.description: Treat AI as a co-creative partner while you steer, so the vision and decisions stay yours.

modules.name: Start Small
modules.description: Scope tightly and resist grandiose visions, because AI will happily over-build and burn your token budget.

modules.name: Relentless Iteration
modules.description: Build, fail, and refine constantly. Credits reset, so take risks and learn through the reps.

modules.name: Demo and Feedback
modules.description: Show working progress weekly and sharpen your builds through group critique, like forced pauses and blank-state handling.

modules.name: Portfolio Mindset
modules.description: Ship projects worth showcasing, then publish them publicly so your work markets itself to future opportunities.

modules.name: LLM Fundamentals
modules.description: Understand the stochastic machine underneath. It predicts the next token, so design around that, not around intelligence.

modules.name: Coding Agents
modules.description: Wield harnesses like Claude Code and Codex that wrap an LLM with file access and tools.

modules.name: Context Engineering
modules.description: Keep context under 40 percent, clear it often, and decompose tasks so the agent never loses the plot.

modules.name: Version Control
modules.description: Track every change in GitHub and run Claude Code from the VS Code terminal to dodge path errors.

modules.name: Skill Building
modules.description: Encode repeatable workflows as markdown skill files, reusable protocols the agent follows every single time.

modules.name: Superpowers
modules.description: Install a full software development methodology into your agent, with planning, briefs, and composable skills built in.

modules.name: MCP Connections
modules.description: Connect agents to GitHub, Notion, Chrome DevTools, and design tools so AI operates your whole stack.

modules.name: App Anatomy
modules.description: See the request-response cycle: browser asks, server hits the database, and HTML, CSS, and JavaScript render.

modules.name: Front-end vs. Back-end
modules.description: Separate the rendered interface from the logic and data, and know when a static site needs neither.

modules.name: APIs
modules.description: Outsource hard problems like auth and databases to services instead of dangerously rolling your own.

modules.name: Happy Path
modules.description: Talk through the ideal user journey out loud, transcribe it, and feed it in as your first requirements.

modules.name: Mermaid Blueprints
modules.description: Diagram architecture as text so AI reads exact connections instead of misinterpreting a picture.

modules.name: Design Systems
modules.description: Use Google Stitch palettes and ShadCN components to escape the generic AI-generated look.

modules.name: Automated QA
modules.description: Test in real Chrome via DevTools MCP and hunt CSS conflicts when a style change won't stick.
